description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow complex surrounded by a rectangular hedge boundary, featuring a central two-story curved building with extensive glass windows and flat roofs. The front area is dominated by a spacious swimming pool, flanked by palm trees and a paved patio with shaded seating areas. The main building is set back from the pool, with a driveway and entryway leading to the structure, and a smaller annex or utility building is visible to one side. The landscaping is minimalistic, with open lawns and a row of trees lining the perimeter. The overall design emphasizes open space, symmetry, and luxury, with a focus on outdoor leisure and entertainment. The materials appear to be concrete, glass, and metal, with a sleek, contemporary finish.
description: A modern, luxury bungalow complex with a curved main building, large pool, palm trees, and minimalist landscaping, enclosed by a hedge.
description_view_0: The front view shows the curved main building, large pool, palm trees, and patio area, all enclosed by a hedge.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the driveway, entryway, and the relationship between the main building and the pool area.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the length of the main building, the annex, and the open lawn space within the hedge boundary.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the back of the curved building, the pool, and the symmetrical arrangement of palm trees and patio.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and sides
